title: Senior Doctor - Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services:
Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services!
